qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Tyler Adams (USA).
Attempt missed. Diego Gómez (Paraguay) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is just a bit too high. Assisted by Antonio Sanabria.

events.description: 迭戈·戈麦斯射门偏出。 安东尼奥·萨纳布里亚参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Folarin Balogun (USA) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Orlando Gill (Paraguay). Assisted by Weston McKennie with a headed pass.

events.description: 巴洛贡射正。 韦斯顿·麦肯尼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, USA. Folarin Balogun is caught offside.
